per_query.question: What is the title of the sports article whose description has the greatest number of characters?

trials.question: What is the title of the sports article whose description has the greatest number of characters?
trials.answer: I need to find the Sports article with the longest description. The AG News dataset has 4 categories: World (1), Sports (2), Business (3), Sci/Tech (4). With 127,600 articles total, each category has ~31,900 articles. Sports articles are article_ids roughly 31,900-63,799.
